tools.name: mempalace_status
tools.description: Show palace health, room counts, collection state, and integration status.

tools.name: mempalace_search
tools.description: Search drawers and closets using MemPalace retrieval.

tools.name: mempalace_mine
tools.description: Mine a project or working directory into palace memory.

tools.name: mempalace_runtime_registry
tools.description: Return the projected MemPalace runtime registry, including operations, integration defaults, plugin profiles, and collection identities.
